title: TMZ Pack of 10 Assorted Vacuum Bags 4x Small (50x70cm), 3x Medium (50x90cm), 2x Large (80x100cm), 1x Extra (100x130cm), Reusable for Storage Coats Clothes Towels Bedding Duvet Blanket Curtains
features: Specification: Material: Durable PA and PE plastic Double-Zip Seal: No air will get in or out with the double zip seal. Easy to close and ensure that your item stays air-tight and compact. Triple Seal Turbo Valve: With the design of triple seal turbo valve, we ensure these large vacuum storage bag can prevent air leakage even in the process of moving.

How to Use: 1. Fold the item neatly and place it in the storage bags. 2. Close the bag and sliding zipper 2 or 3 times to make sure air tightness. 3. Use the home vacuum cleaner to vacuum out the air. 4. Tighten the lid of the turbo valve quickly after air has been all vacuum out. 5. Just open the bag and release the air when you need to use the items again.

Note: 1. Don't overfill. 2. Make sure the zip has been sealed firmly. 3. Do not remove the pink rubber stopper inside the valve when sucking the air out. 4. Place the vacuum bags away from the sharp objects.
Package included; 1x extra large (100 x 130cm) 2x large (100x80cm) 3x medium (90x50cm) 4x small (70x50cm)
